description: Address 3 issues from semantic review: fix cdk synth CI failure, activate pytest-cov, and clear NODE_OPTIONS in CI workflow.
steps: Step 1: Add continue-on-error: true to the 'CDK synth' step in .github/workflows/ci.yml (or supply dummy account/region env vars) so CI does not fail without AWS credentials.
Step 2: Add --cov option to pytest invocation by updating pytest.ini addopts or remove pytest-cov from requirements-dev.txt. Chosen approach: add addopts with --cov to pytest.ini.
Step 3: Add env: NODE_OPTIONS: '' to the CI workflow job or relevant steps to prevent jsii breakage.
acceptance_criteria: CI workflow cdk synth step will not block pipeline when no AWS credentials are present
pytest-cov is either used (--cov in pytest.ini or CI step) or removed from requirements-dev.txt
NODE_OPTIONS is explicitly cleared in the CI workflow
findings: All 3 review issues resolved. Tests pass with coverage reporting (100% on cdk_base). CI workflow now has NODE_OPTIONS cleared at job level and both CDK steps use continue-on-error.
